name: Godiva Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, melt chocolate and butter together until smooth. Remove from heat and add instant coffee. Set aside to cool.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs and salt until slightly fluffy. Gradually add sugar and continue beating until the mixture is ribbony (about 10 minutes).
3. Add vanilla extract, Godiva Liqueur, and cooled chocolate mixture to the egg mixture while beating on low speed.
4. Fold in sifted flour until just incorporated.
5. Gently fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased, floured, and parchment-lined 11" x 17" baking pan.
7. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Lower the temperature to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Yield: Twenty 3" x 3" brownies.
